---
title: "Data Explorer"
---

<div id="controls">
  <label for="system-select">State system:</label>
  <select id="system-select">
    <option value="cow">Correlates of War (COW)</option>
    <option value="gw">Gleditsch-Ward (GW + microstates)</option>
  </select>
  <input type="text" id="search-box" placeholder="Search countries...">
</div>

<div id="country-list"></div>

<div id="timeline-panel" style="display:none;">
  <h3 id="timeline-title"></h3>
  <div id="timeline-container"></div>
  <div id="timeline-legend"></div>
</div>

```{=html}
<script>
const STATUS_COLORS = {
  "Embassy": "#1b5e20",
  "Ambassador Nonresident": "#388e3c",
  "Legation": "#2196f3",
  "Envoy Nonresident": "#64b5f6",
  "Consulate": "#f57c00",
  "Consul Nonresident": "#ffb74d",
  "Liaison": "#7b1fa2",
  "Interests": "#ce93d8",
  "None": "#bdbdbd"
};

let data = null;
let currentSystem = "cow";

async function loadData() {
  const resp = await fetch("data.json");
  data = await resp.json();
  renderCountryList();
}

function renderCountryList() {
  const sys = data[currentSystem];
  if (!sys) return;
  const search = document.getElementById("search-box").value.toLowerCase();
  const entries = Object.entries(sys)
    .map(([abbrev, info]) => ({abbrev, ...info}))
    .filter(e => !search || e.name.toLowerCase().includes(search) || e.abbrev.toLowerCase().includes(search))
    .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

  const container = document.getElementById("country-list");
  const table = document.createElement("table");
  table.className = "country-table";
  const thead = document.createElement("thead");
  thead.innerHTML = "<tr><th>Code</th><th>Name</th><th>#</th><th>Numeric</th></tr>";
  table.appendChild(thead);
  const tbody = document.createElement("tbody");
  for (const e of entries) {
    const tr = document.createElement("tr");
    tr.className = "country-row";
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${e.abbrev}</td><td>${e.name}</td><td>${e.code}</td><td>${e.ranges.length}</td>`;
    tr.addEventListener("click", () => showTimeline(e.abbrev));
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  }
  table.appendChild(tbody);
  container.innerHTML = "";
  container.appendChild(table);
}

function showTimeline(abbrev) {
  const sys = data[currentSystem];
  const info = sys[abbrev];
  if (!info) return;

  document.getElementById("timeline-panel").style.display = "block";
  document.getElementById("timeline-title").textContent =
    `${info.name} (${abbrev}, ${currentSystem.toUpperCase()} ${info.code})`;

  const ranges = info.ranges;
  const minDate = new Date(ranges[0].start);
  const maxDate = new Date(ranges[ranges.length - 1].end);
  const totalMs = maxDate - minDate;

  const container = document.getElementById("timeline-container");
  container.innerHTML = "";

  const bar = document.createElement("div");
  bar.className = "timeline-bar";

  for (const r of ranges) {
    const start = new Date(r.start);
    const end = new Date(r.end);
    const leftPct = ((start - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
    const widthPct = ((end - start) / totalMs) * 100;

    const seg = document.createElement("div");
    seg.className = "timeline-segment";
    seg.style.left = leftPct + "%";
    seg.style.width = Math.max(widthPct, 0.15) + "%";
    seg.style.backgroundColor = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";

    const startStr = r.start;
    const endStr = r.end;
    const usdos = r.usdos ? ` (${r.usdos})` : "";
    seg.title = `${r.status}: ${startStr} to ${endStr}${usdos}`;
    bar.appendChild(seg);
  }
  container.appendChild(bar);

  // Year labels
  const labels = document.createElement("div");
  labels.className = "timeline-labels";
  const startYear = minDate.getFullYear();
  const endYear = maxDate.getFullYear();
  const step = Math.max(1, Math.round((endYear - startYear) / 10));
  for (let y = startYear; y <= endYear; y += step) {
    const d = new Date(y, 0, 1);
    const pct = ((d - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
    if (pct >= 0 && pct <= 100) {
      const lbl = document.createElement("span");
      lbl.className = "timeline-label";
      lbl.style.left = pct + "%";
      lbl.textContent = y;
      labels.appendChild(lbl);
    }
  }
  container.appendChild(labels);

  // Range detail table
  const detailTable = document.createElement("table");
  detailTable.className = "range-detail-table";
  detailTable.innerHTML = "<thead><tr><th>Start</th><th>End</th><th>Status</th><th>USDOS Name</th></tr></thead>";
  const dtbody = document.createElement("tbody");
  for (const r of ranges) {
    const tr = document.createElement("tr");
    const color = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${r.start}</td><td>${r.end}</td><td><span class="status-dot" style="background:${color}"></span> ${r.status}</td><td>${r.usdos || ""}</td>`;
    dtbody.appendChild(tr);
  }
  detailTable.appendChild(dtbody);
  container.appendChild(detailTable);

  // Legend
  const legend = document.getElementById("timeline-legend");
  const usedStatuses = [...new Set(ranges.map(r => r.status))];
  legend.innerHTML = usedStatuses.map(s =>
    `<span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-color" style="background:${STATUS_COLORS[s]}"></span>${s}</span>`
  ).join(" ");

  // Scroll to timeline
  document.getElementById("timeline-panel").scrollIntoView({behavior: "smooth"});
}

document.getElementById("system-select").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
  currentSystem = e.target.value;
  document.getElementById("timeline-panel").style.display = "none";
  renderCountryList();
});

document.getElementById("search-box").addEventListener("input", () => {
  renderCountryList();
});

loadData();
</script>
```
